heading: Background
body:
LlamaIndex is an open-source framework designed to
simplify how you connect custom data sources to LLM (Large Language Model)s.
It provides several tools such as data connectors, indexes,
and query engines to help you load and
prepare vector embeddings for RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) applications.

By integrating MongoDB Vector Search with LlamaIndex, you can use
MongoDB as a vector database and use MongoDB Vector Search to
implement RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) by retrieving semantically similar documents
from your data. To learn more about RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation),
see [Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) with MongoDB](ai-key-concepts).
